claim: AgentHQ serves as operations layer for multi-agent AI workforce: assign work, supervise, control access
actionable: Use AgentHQ to centralize agent management, enforce org policies, audit all agent actions

claim: Multi-vendor agent architecture enables mixing Anthropic, Google, Cognition agents in single platform
actionable: Design agent systems supporting multiple model/tool providers to avoid vendor lock-in

claim: AI integrated across full SDLC: planning, implementation, code review, security, refactoring, deployment
actionable: Deploy agents at each SDLC phase (specs, coding, review, hardening) rather than single-point integration

claim: Code quality and security review agents identify and reject low-quality/vulnerable code before merging
actionable: Add code review agents that scan for security, quality issues before human approval

claim: Enterprise AI controls require governance, permissions, audit trails, compliance scoring at org level
actionable: Implement centralized agent governance: define policies, track access, measure metrics, audit usage
